title: Agency Information Collection Activities; Submission for OMB Review; Comment Request
abstract: In accordance with the requirements of the Paperwork Reduction Act of 1995 (PRA), the OCC, the Board, and the FDIC (the agencies) may not conduct or sponsor, and the respondent is not required to respond to, an information collection unless it displays a currently valid Office of Management and Budget (OMB) control number. On June 29, 2023, the Federal Financial Institutions Examination Council (FFIEC), of which the agencies are members, requested public comment for 60 days on a proposal to exte
action: Joint notice and request for comment.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
